title: Smoky Silky Plum Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: This Smoky Silky Plum Tomato dish is a hangover-cure-inspired Slovakian recipe featuring plum tomatoes for a touch of sweetness and smokiness, along with keto-friendly ingredients to satisfy your dietary needs.
instructions: Slice red peppers and onions into thin rounds. Thinly slice plum tomatoes as well.
In a large skillet, heat avocado oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add chopped onions and red peppers to the skillet with garlic. Stir-fry for another 5-7 minutes until vegetables are tender but still slightly crisp.
Toss in plum tomatoes, paprika powder, and salt/pepper. Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes until tomato skins start to blister slightly.
Transfer vegetables into a baking dish. Drizzle with coconut aminos if using (about half a cup) and sprinkle nutritional yeast on top evenly. Cover tightly with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes, or until tomatoes are soft and juices start to release from skins.
Uncover and stir vegetables together. Cook for another minute to meld flavors. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve hot as a side dish or with a protein of your choice.
